step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a black square-neck cropped tank top, matching black mid-thigh tailored shorts, low-heeled brown leather sandals, a thin gold tennis bracelet, small gold huggie hoops, hair down in soft beach waves, subtle bronzy makeup with a soft glow. She stands on a modern minimalist patio at golden hour, a low concrete planter with small ornamental grasses behind her, a folded teak deck chair to her right with a cream linen throw draped over it, distant city skyline softly out of focus in the deep background. Standing facing the camera at a slight three-quarter angle, weight on her right leg, looking directly at the camera with a relaxed confident smile. Both hands are visible in the frame, not in her pockets, not behind her back, not cropped out of frame. Her right hand rests gently at her side, her left hand rests at her side. Strong warm golden-hour sunlight from a low angle on her right side, golden rim light across her right shoulder, deep amber tones across the patio, soft cool sky in the background. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro 35mm equivalent. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Golden-hour glow confident calm mood, palette of black tailored, warm gold, deep amber. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: Right hand at chest level, thumb on the front face of the box, index and middle fingers on the back, ring and pinky tucked under, box angled slightly toward the camera so the front face catches the warm golden-hour light directly.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will adjust her right arm to raise from her side to chest level, bending the elbow naturally to bring the Alluvi box up in front of her upper torso with the front face angled toward the camera and right side catching the golden rim light. Her body posture, shoulder, and wrist angle will shift to accommodate the natural holding pose.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: id_weight at fal API cap (1.0). true_cfg at default 1.5 — medium full mid-thigh-up framing where face is mid-importance and warm directional golden-hour light flatters the persona's deep-tan skin and green eyes.
